programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.desc: Mike Galanos puts a spotlight on news and developments in criminal investigations.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders (Part 1)
programme.desc: During a terrifying three-day period in late August 1990, five college students were found brutally murdered in Gainesville, Florida.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders (Part 2)
programme.desc: After five murders it would take investigators months - and the discovery of a campsite, a screwdriver and an audio tape - before they identified who the serial killer was.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lasseter's Gold
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets off deep into the Australian Outback, following the footsteps of legendary explorer Harold Lasseter, who claims to have found a vast field of gold. Josh follows the clues that ultimately lead to a breathtaking conclusion.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Butch Cassidy's Lost Loot
programme.desc: Josh immerses himself in Wild West lore on a quest to find Butch Cassidy's missing money. He traces the iconic outlaw's footsteps through Colorado, Utah and Nevada, eventually learning that he may need to find the man himself to locate the lost loot.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Plummer's Gold
programme.desc: Josh sets off for gold rush country to search for the lost fortune of a notorious Montana sheriff. During his investigation, Josh explores hidden cave systems and blows open a mine that's been sealed for over a century.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Unearthed: Cracking the Secret
programme.desc: Unearthed with extra facts and bonus footage: Josh Gates is on a nation-wide treasure hunt to uncover the mystery buried for over 40 years: The Secret. He taps into a network of Secret detectives and uses cutting-edge technology in search of clues.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Gold Rush of the Atlantic
programme.desc: Josh Gates has a fresh lead on the massive lost treasure of the shipwrecked 1715 Spanish fleet. Josh returns to the waters of Florida's Atlantic coast and dives in with a new expedition that uses the latest high tech to locate the fleet's flagship.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Earth Block Ranch
programme.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their San Antonio forever home.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: No Guts, No Gold
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Relive the incredible fortunes won and lost in this look back at the high-stakes drama from the first eight seasons, including the Hoffman crew's arrival to Porcupine Creek and Parker's push for millions in gold.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Gold Rush of the Atlantic
programme.desc: Josh Gates has a fresh lead on the massive lost treasure of the shipwrecked 1715 Spanish fleet. Josh returns to the waters of Florida's Atlantic coast and dives in with a new expedition that uses the latest high tech to locate the fleet's flagship.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Earth Block Ranch
programme.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their San Antonio forever home.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: No Guts, No Gold
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Relive the incredible fortunes won and lost in this look back at the high-stakes drama from the first eight seasons, including the Hoffman crew's arrival to Porcupine Creek and Parker's push for millions in gold.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: Josh joins leading archeologists as they investigate America's first missing-persons case, the lost colony of Roanoke. Following newly discovered clues, he'll reach new heights as he digs for answers to this over 400-year-old mystery.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Son Dethrones Father
programme.desc: Parker Schnabel fights rising floodwaters to save his cut. Hunter Hoffman shuts down his father Todd and Tony Beets takes a convoy of military trucks on a treacherous journey to hunt down parts for his monster dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Colorado Strikes Back
programme.desc: Todd shuts down his operations to support Freddy Dodge as he pleads with the county commissioners to allow him to mine his claim. Parker suffers as Rick's attempt to mine more horribly backfires. Tony's dredge is losing gold so son Kevin is forced to act.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Inferno
programme.desc: As forest fires tear through the Klondike threatening to end Parker's season, his crew begins to desert. As Todd runs three wash-plants for the first time, his mechanic Juan is pushed to the breaking point. Tony is desperate to get his barge to run.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Mighty Uppercut
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman suspects sabotage when the crew is hit by a water crisis. Parker Schnabel battles to move his monster wash-plant Sluicifer. Tony Beets orders Monica to fire up her wash-plant but a rookie mistake shuts them down.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Gold Bars and Hail Mary's
programme.desc: In a mega-packed episode Todd is out of luck, and ground, until he makes a desperate play for new land. Parker's sitting pretty on a pile of gold, but pushes Rick too far. Tony attempts to jump start his season on a risky voyage up the Yukon River.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Devil's Finger
programme.desc: Just as safety inspectors arrive, Todd's son Hunter commits a serious violation. Parker is confronted by the owner of his new claim. Tony races against time to move the massive bucket-line of his second dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Holy Grail
programme.desc: Todd discovers an historic mine site that could turn his season around and battles monster boulders to get gold. Tony mounts a massive operation to replace a 24-ton bucket line and Parker's parents arrive for his birthday bearing extraordinary gifts.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Running Aground
programme.desc: The Hoffmans are given a unique form of inspiration in the form of a solar eclipse. Parker turns Rick's operation around while he's away and Mike takes the lead on the family barge but his trip down the mighty Yukon doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: The Permafrost Wall
programme.desc: Todd's season gets kicked off with a surprise ruling from the county. Meanwhile, Parker's foreman returns to his operation to find it's in an unsavory state and Tony's dredge hits a wall of permafrost that prevents him from getting the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Rookie Mistake
programme.desc: The Hoffmans experience disfunction after Todd's son makes a rookie mistake. Tony gets creative while tearing down his second dredge and Parker risks damaging his washplant while rushing to finish his Scribner Creek operation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Parker the Furious
programme.desc: Parker's crew gets stuck in the mud after opening a new cut and Todd hopes to assemble a new washplant with Hunter's help. Meanwhile, Tony gets stuck up the creek without a proper barge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Big Money Mistakes
programme.desc: Parker attempts a massive washplant move all on his own while Todd races to set up a new trommel. Todd later experiences a medical emergency and Tony's daughter makes a costly mistake.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Gold on the Mountainside
programme.desc: Rick's Indian River operation is in danger of shutting down after a production dive and Tony's progress is stalled when his son takes a break. Later, Todd's crew investigates a mountainside after being given an ultimatum.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Always the Pageant Girl...
programme.desc: Ashley, former Miss New Jersey, is desperate for a dress that puts her pageant days behind her. Rodeo queen Becky wants a gown with bling. Having tried over 100 dresses, Melissa desires something to stand out from the crowd.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Father Knows Dress
programme.desc: Caitie and her wedding planner father do not see eye-to-eye on a gown. Danielle lost her mother to cancer, so Dad steps in to help her make the big decision. Chic Ciccarelli is back for her fitting, channelling her deceased father every step of the way.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Mom's Seal of Approval
programme.desc: Stephanie wants to look like a 'sex kitten' on her big day, but her mom wishes for something modest. Second-time bride Lisa's mother is very opinionated about her dress choices. Elizabeth fears her mom won't approve the $13K gown she bought without her.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Performances Piece
programme.desc: Tony Danza makes his debut at the salon to help his Broadway co-star find the perfect bridal costume for her role in their new musical, 'Honeymoon in Vegas.' Ballerina Valerie wants a wedding gown that is nothing like her princess dance costumes.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: My Sisters are Picking Out My Dress!
programme.desc: Arlicia is letting her opinionated sisters plan her entire wedding, including choosing her wedding dress. Ameena has an unlimited budget and bridezilla tendencies. Karen is especially thankful to be shopping today after nearly losing her fiancé.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Theresa Visits Jail
programme.desc: Theresa is so touched reading a woman whose son passed away in jail, she decides to do a group reading in a Long Island prison. While there, Theresa connects a woman with her family, in one of the most touching and surprising readings to date.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: First Look: A Spirit Returns
programme.desc: A sneak peak of the new season - Theresa's daughter is engaged and one young spirit won't stay away from Theresa. Then, Theresa heads to LA to read Louie Anderson, Wayne Brady and Tatum O'Neal.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Black Market Baby Dealer
programme.desc: In the 1950s and 1960s, a doctor named Thomas Hicks illegally sold over 200 babies on the black market. Now, lead investigator, Jane Blasio, is working to reunite stolen babies with biological families while trying to unearth secrets about Hicks himself.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Black Market Baby Dealer
programme.desc: In the 1950s and 1960s, a doctor named Thomas Hicks illegally sold over 200 babies on the black market. Now, lead investigator, Jane Blasio, is working to reunite stolen babies with biological families while trying to unearth secrets about Hicks himself.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Forced Delivery
programme.desc: Jane discovers a suspicious pattern of babies with extremely low birth weights coming out of the clinic. Chris makes a discovery of his own, Dr. Hicks may have hidden birth records in his mausoleum. Diane hopes to meet her biological father.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Black Market Baby Dealer
programme.desc: In the 1950s and 1960s, a doctor named Thomas Hicks illegally sold over 200 babies on the black market. Now, lead investigator, Jane Blasio, is working to reunite stolen babies with biological families while trying to unearth secrets about Hicks himself.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Black Market Baby Dealer
programme.desc: In the 1950s and 1960s, a doctor named Thomas Hicks illegally sold over 200 babies on the black market. Now, lead investigator, Jane Blasio, is working to reunite stolen babies with biological families while trying to unearth secrets about Hicks himself.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: I Now Pronounce You...
programme.desc: Theresa is asked to officiate a wedding for two people who met at one of her group readings, and Larry is asked to be their best man. Before heading to Los Angeles for the ceremony, Theresa surprises a woman on Wall Street with a reading.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Star Studded Spirit
programme.desc: On this season premiere, Theresa gives readings to some of your favorite celebrities. Comedian Rosie O'Donnell, Oscar-winning actress and comic Mo'Nique, 'Mike & Molly' star Billy Gardell, and Porsha from the hit show 'Empire,' Ta'Rhonda Jones.

programme.title: Quints by Surprise: Dog Daze
programme.desc: The Joneses add to the family when Eliot gets her long-promised puppy. The whole family learns that a new dog comes with a lot of responsibility.

programme.title: Quints by Surprise: A Quints Christmas
programme.desc: The Jones family goes all out for the Quints' second Christmas. Casey starts some new family traditions, while Ethan goes a little over the top with the decorations.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: The Quints Take Manhattan
programme.desc: When a talk show asks the Busbys to make a live TV appearance in New York, the family heads to the Big Apple. Travelling with six kids, however, is as difficult as it sounds. A last minute trip to the doctor has Danielle and Adam concerned about Hazel.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Better Get a Dumpster
programme.desc: A woman's out of control obsession with clothes threatens to destroy her relationship with her only daughter.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: My House Can Kill Me
programme.desc: Hsi Ming and Miranda are both mothers and extreme hoarders, leaving their children with little room to play.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Dr. Bikini
programme.desc: A man comes into the ER because he was hurt by a boat propeller. A patient creates a deadly chain reaction after they are discharged. The ER's head nurse and computers are down.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Frozen!
programme.desc: Doctors struggle to save a young man brought to the ER frozen and pulseless.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sheklia and Talli

programme.desc: Max and co-host iO Tillett Wright help 18-year-old Mecca connect with the boy she’s loved for the past five years. But when iO discovers that Mecca’s digital beau may be using her pictures to catfish others, Mecca needs answers.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Colleen and Tony
programme.desc: Colleen met Tony online and fell madly in love. Though they've never met, Tony proposed to Colleen over the phone and she accepted. Now, Nev and Max help her finally face the truth to reveal the mystery man she's engaged to.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Steven and Samm

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Dejay, Malik and Josiah

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike and Caroline
programme.desc: Mike fell in love with Caroline online. He grew suspicious when she continually avoided meeting him, yet left notes at his car. Mike then learns that she is diagnosed with cancer.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Brittany and Bryon
programme.desc: When Brittany, a single mom, finds love online with Bryon, a marine who may get deployed again to Iraq, she seeks Nev and Max's help before she runs out of time to discover if her seemingly perfect military man is real.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jose and Jay
programme.desc: Jasmine writes to Nev and Max asking for help for a friend that they have helped before.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mathan and Leah
programme.desc: Nev and co-host Kamie Crawford help Mathan find Leah, a girl he's been talking to for a decade yet can never meet. But Leah has shocking secrets beyond their wildest imaginations that will lead them on one of their toughest chases ever.

programme.title: The First 48: Murder in Pleasant Grove

programme.title: The First 48: The Girl Who Knew Too Much/ The Guardian
programme.desc: In Dallas, an unidentified girl is found brutally shot in a field, and may have been killed for her silence. Then in Cleveland, a young father is shot in the head trying to break up a fight.

programme.title: The First 48: Best Laid Plans/ Burned Alive
programme.desc: In Harris County, a young woman set on fire clings to life as deputies race to find who left her for dead. In Cleveland, when a teenager is shot down in the street, detectives discover his best friends may have something to do with the murder.

programme.title: The First 48: Million Dollar Question
programme.desc: In Cleveland, a man is found in a dark alley, shot multiple times and left for dead. Detectives Ray Diaz and Kathy Cruz put their lives on the line to untangle a web of lies and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: The First 48: Knock Knock
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a man from out of town is found dead in his motel room and Detective Michael Zenoni must wade through a web of secrets and lies to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Live PD

programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr take to the court to serve up some seriously personal tennis lessons and then head to the park for a bewildering game of Now! The loser must put his face through the ultimate test during a food presentation.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hellcopter
programme.desc: The joker that required medical attention during the fat foot race punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Statue of Limitations

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Kind of Like a Seafoam Green

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene

programme.title: I Was Prey: All Alone
programme.desc: During an archery hunt in Cranbrook, British Columbia, Chad Dueck comes face-to-face with a mother grizzly bear. In Tracy, California, Walt Dean King is savagely attacked by a Brahma Bull roaming his neighborhood.

programme.title: I Was Prey: One Wrong Step
programme.desc: While vacationing in South Africa, Peter Knottenbelt suddenly finds himself in the jaws of a massive crocodile. In Nova Scotia, Meg Doyle is walking her beloved dog when they're suddenly ambushed by a pair of angry raccoons.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Night Terror
programme.desc: On family trip to the Canadian wilderness, 12-year-old Zac Delventhal is dragged from his sleeping bag by a hungry wolf. While swimming in the Pacific Ocean, Maria Korcsmaros is attacked by a Great White shark.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: A spearfisherman is ambushed by a massive tiger shark. A British traveler is gored by a 6-foot elephant tusk. Just days before her wedding, a bride is pursued by a hungry crocodile. A couple celebrating their wedding anniversary is attacked by a giraffe.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Follow wildlife adventurer and biologist Forrest Galante as explores the real stories behind animals thought to be gone forever and tries to prove their existence so he can protect them and help them thrive again.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Mauled in the Mountains
programme.desc: Louie van Grootel is working in the Canadian wilderness when he's attacked by a massive grizzly bear. In Colorado, Travis Kauffman is trail-running and comes face to face with a hungry mountain lion.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Close Encounters: Deadly Decision
programme.desc: Sandy Prince is swimming in an African river when she's attacked by a massive crocodile. While mountain-biking in Washington State, Phil Anderson comes face to face with a hungry cougar.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Grisly Encounters
programme.desc: Jordan Carbery is investigating a noise outside his cabin and encounters a massive grizzly bear. Days before their destination-wedding celebration, Zanele Fox and her husband take a river tour when she is thrown from her raft and ravaged by a crocodile.

programme.desc: Louie van Grootel is working in the Canadian wilderness when he's attacked by a massive grizzly bear. In Colorado, Travis Kauffman is trail-running and comes face to face with a hungry mountain lion.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Surfing Snakes
programme.desc: Steve and his best mate Wes set out on an adventure through the wild islands of Indonesia looking for the best surf. Both accomplished surfers, the pair encounter some of the more venomous snakes of Indonesia as well as lizards and mischievous monkeys.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kittens: Growing Up
programme.desc: A special episode, catching up with the Persian, Bengal and British Shorthair litters a year after they were first introduced. These kittens are all grown up, and they're taking on big challenges, settling into new homes, and reuniting with old playmates.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Meow Mates
programme.desc: Jackson guides a defeated couple and their cat who has been locked away for over a year. He visits a "Cat-Bassador" who works with his guardian to help special needs cats find forever homes. And Jackson visits an incredible prison program.

programme.title: The Zoo: Moving Day
programme.desc: The Zoo's huge male sea lion is in rut, and staff need to move the younger males before he comes territorial. The veterinary team come up with an ingenious solution to repair Dinky the Flamingo's broken ankle. And feeding a rock python proves challenging.

programme.title: The Zoo: Handle With Care
programme.desc: A tomistoma, a freshwater crocodilian, stops laying eggs and a team of keepers scrambles to treat her. The veterinary team has to rescue a baby antelope that isn't getting the care it needs from its mother. And Mert the Goose takes a field trip.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bouba's Back
programme.desc: Andean bear Bouba returns from the National Zoo in Washington D.C. to reunite with his loyal mate Nicole. Vets exercise the utmost caution in treating a venomous king cobra. Plus, Blanche, a feisty female alpaca, is due to give birth at any moment.

programme.title: Give a Dog a Home: Live!
programme.desc: There are thousands of animals in shelters across the U.S. in need of good, loving homes. Now Animal Planet, with Best Friends Animal Society, wants to connect these animals directly to our viewers, live and in real time.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Never Let Go
programme.desc: The police need Villalobos' help when a woman in the French Quarter is rushed to the hospital, leaving her dogs behind. A recent divorcee from Alabama visits the rescue to help fill the void in his home. Favourite dog, Rhino, faces a health crisis.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Brother's Return
programme.desc: Country Matt returns to help his brother, a new parolee, overcome his fear of dogs. Earl and Tia's daughter-in-law race to save a stray running loose in scorching temperatures. A couple of empty nesters visit VRC in search of a new friend.

programme.title: River Monsters: Chainsaw Predator
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade heads to a remote river in the Australian outback to try and catch the rare but fearsome freshwater sawfish.

programme.title: River Monsters: Electric Executioner
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to Brazil's wild west in search of a river monster that has killed three cowboys. Jeremy finally corners his elusive prey in the most unexpected place. All he has to do then is catch it, without getting killed.

programme.title: Movie: ATL
programme.desc: Friends face different challenges as they prepare for life after high school.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Blacks
programme.desc: The Black family decides to leave their Chicago home for Beverly Hills after they unexpectedly come into some money. Their newfound bliss in L.A. is short-lived, though, when they arrive to discover that it's the annual purge night.

programme.title: BET Hip Hop Awards
programme.desc: The 2019 Hip Hop Awards are bigger than ever. Get ready for show-stopping performances with host Lil Duval.

programme.desc: A fight between Martin and Gina before their engagement party threatens the evening.

programme.title: Martin: The Hoe Down in Motown

programme.title: Martin: Martin's on the Move
programme.desc: Depressed, Martin leaves Detroit to find himself but doesn't tell Gina where he is going.

programme.title: Martin: In Search of ... Martin
programme.desc: Gina and the gang learn of Martin's whereabouts through a cancelled cheque.

programme.title: Martin: Martin Returns
programme.desc: After learning more about the cult leader, Martin escapes and returns to Detroit. Once he arrives, he finds that Gina took the liberty of redecorating his apartment.

programme.title: Martin: I've Got Work to Do
programme.desc: Martin, desperately seeking a new job, lowers his standards and begins taking a stream of low-paying, part-time jobs.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Snap Back
programme.desc: A record label offers Lynn a deal after she and Joan attend an Erykah Badu concert. Maya's taking pills to cope with the lost of her baby.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Save the Last Dance

programme.desc: Jupiter is hotter than it should be and scientists don't understand why; the Curiosity Rover finds something strange on Mars; detectives turn to NASA for help with a murder cold case.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Mars's Deepest Secret
programme.desc: British astronomers working for the CIA intercept Soviet photos of the moon. A malfunction on the ISS could poison its crew with deadly ammonia gas. A startling image taken by a NASA probe points to evidence that life could exist on Mars.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Return of the Moon Bugs

programme.desc: After Lourdes Riddle is found strangled to death in the trunk of her car, detective Joe Kenda follows a twisting maze of military and cultural secrets.

programme.title: A Gamble With the Devil
programme.desc: A woman fails to pick up her husband from the casino, and is later found dead. A trail of evidence, including surveillance footage, ultimately leads police right to the killer's doorstep.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Where is Claudia Jane?
programme.desc: A fifteen-year old girl is reported missing, and Lt. Joe Kenda must investigate the mysterious circumstances surrounding her disappearance. Then When a family man is shot dead on his neighbor's doorstep, was it self-defense or coldblooded murder?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Sex, Lies, and Surveillance Tape
programme.desc: A confrontation between enemies turns deadly, and Lt. Joe Kenda's best hope for answers lies with a grainy, dubbed-over surveillance tape. Then An elderly man is fighting for his life. Was it a slip-and-fall, or something infinitely more disturbing?

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Stalker or Lover?
programme.desc: After a woman's body is discovered in a burning mobile home, Charlotte, NC detective Garry McFadden finds himself with two potential murder suspects, both with solid alibis. He discovers that the flames themselves hold the secret to the killer's identity.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Serial Shooter
programme.desc: When a beloved tennis star is shot in the back after attending a charity ball, Detective McFadden must determine who could have had it in for such a seemingly faultless golden boy.

programme.title: See No Evil: I'd Kill to be You
programme.desc: On November 12, 2012, Atlanta entrepreneur Terry Porter is found shot dead, execution style in the front yard of his home. There is no forensic evidence and no witnesses to the murder.

programme.title: See No Evil: Random Sighting
programme.desc: Tosha Lampkin is in Shreveport, Louisiana visiting family. After a late-night trip for food, Tosha disappears. Her burnt out rental car is discovered... along with Tosha's remains. CCTV cameras provide detectives with their only lead on her killers.

programme.title: See No Evil: Eye in the Sky
programme.desc: When 27-year-old Christie Wilson disappears after a night at the local casino, surveillance cameras reveal her gambling with a mysterious man. Can this video footage unlock the secrets of what happened next and help bring her home alive?

programme.title: See No Evil: All Eyes on Megan
programme.desc: When a teenager goes missing from her local Walmart, detectives struggle for leads. But then surveillance cameras reveal terrifying footage of a prowler kidnapping her, transforming this investigation into a desperate race to bring her home alive.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: My Son Is Not a Monster
programme.desc: An 11-year-old's soon-to be step-mom is found murdered in their home. A child-sized shotgun, gun residue on his clothes, and a witness account all seem to point to the boy as the shooter.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Presents: Homicide: Secrets, Lies and Audiotape
programme.desc: Bob Angleton, a Texas bookie and police informant, is twice charged with killing his wife in a Texas tale of double crosses, adultery, blackmail and murder. Bob Angleton and his wife Doris appeared to be living the American dream.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What the Doctor Ordered
programme.desc: A hotshot surgeon on vacation with his girlfriend divulges a dark plot to murder his ex-wife.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: To Love, Honor, and Kill
programme.desc: Noor and Marwan, young Iraqi American teens from feuding households, fall in love despite Noor's family's opposition.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love and Dishonor
programme.desc: When Montreal teen Zainab Shafia meets Ammar Wahid, it's love at first sight. But their relationship is forbidden by her strict father and he'll stop at nothing to ensure his daughter obeys his rules of honor.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Sex and the Married Man
programme.desc: A married man embarks on a forbidden relationship with his 14-year-old babysitter. When his wife finds out, he will stop at nothing to keep his affair secret from the police.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Together Forever, Forever Together
programme.desc: A young teen forbidden to date falls in love with a senior at her high school. The two go to extreme lengths to keep their relationship secret but when it is threatened with exposure they vow to stay together, whatever the cost.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Pope's Bodyguards
programme.desc: From stone-age Hawaii to 16th-century Japan, from Ancient Greece to the Byzantine Empire, there have always been elite Special Forces.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Vlad's Impalers
programme.desc: Vlad the Impaler, the inspiration for the fictional character of Dracula, was one of the most ruthless and brutal rulers in medieval Europe.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Real Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace is the most famous Scot in history. In 1296, Scotland is invaded by English King Edward I and only one man is prepared to stand in his way.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Kung Fu Nun
programme.desc: 1644. Ng Mui escapes from Beijing. Taking refuge in a Shaolin monastery, she learns their Kung Fu and develops a new form of the martial art.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Kung Fu Nun
programme.desc: 1644. Ng Mui escapes from Beijing. Taking refuge in a Shaolin monastery, she learns their Kung Fu and develops a new form of the martial art.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Air Aces: Gabby Gabreski
programme.desc: U.S. Air Force Pilot Francis Gabby Gabreski made it his personal mission to be the best flying ace there ever was.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Combat Shotguns
programme.desc: Deadly at close quarters the combat shotgun is a powerful tool of any army. Host Wil Willis fires history's greatest shotguns, from the Blunderbuss to the modern Benelli M4 and Mossburg 590.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Gourmet Holiday
programme.desc: A showcase of gourmet food for holiday entertaining or for gift giving.

programme.title: Keurig: Gourmet Coffee Made Perfect
programme.desc: See the leading single-cup brewing system.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hope Rises in White Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: After the flood waters recede, the Barnwood Builders join the recovery efforts in their hometown of White Sulphur Springs, WV. They build a timber frame pavilion as the centerpiece of a memorial park, and the community builds barn wood picnic tables.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hometown Heroes
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the guys sit down to talk about a few of their favourite things: cabins and barns. With special guests, never-before-seen footage and hilarious outtakes, the builders are having fun. Mark also talks about his new house.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Grandma's Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys save the logs from a fire-damaged home in West Virginia. Mark promises the family who sold him the cabin that he will honor their history here. Once the logs are salvaged, the cabin is rebuilt on the Boneyard for a client in Montana.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Families Helping Families
programme.desc: Mike is going back to his roots and helping families, along with his kids, Michael and Sherry. At a home they dub The City Barn, they plan to fix the weathered roof and make the property more accessible for a 13-year-old who is battling cancer.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Structural issues at their two clients' houses means Mike and Michael must split up and tackle the jobs separately. Michael takes on the roof and other problems at The City Barn, while Mike uncovers unsettling complications.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Lawn and Order
programme.desc: Dan and Sarah envied their neighbour's deck, and after receiving a too good to be true quote, hired the same person for the job. But the project was much bigger than anticipated and vastly underquoted. Mike arrives just in time to avoid catastrophe.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: To Mike, From Aggie
programme.desc: A nurse who works countless hours at a brain injury center is too busy supporting her family to fix the many problems in her new house. Her mother-in-law Aggie is so desperate to help she delivers a letter straight to Mike's mailbox.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Structural issues at their two clients' houses means Mike and Michael must split up and tackle the jobs separately. Michael takes on the roof and other problems at The City Barn, while Mike uncovers unsettling complications.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: A House Full of Hornets
programme.desc: Dennis and Andrea's home has two driveways, overgrown shrubs and an unsightly paint color that all contribute to a unique look that needs to change.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Trowel and Error
programme.desc: Best friends that are behind on their flip in Guntersville, Alabama, disagree on how to get back on track. One wants to hire subcontractors to help pick up the pace, but the other wants to protect their profit margin by figuring it out themselves.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Columns, Counters and Cousins
programme.desc: Corey decides to flip a house in Tennessee with his girlfriend Lauren and cousin Chris. Unfortunately nothing can prepare them for the amount of work in store for them. They run into problem after problem and may need professional help.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flue Season
programme.desc: A husband-wife duo flip an oddly shaped lake house in Leitchfield, Kentucky, with a unique history. Shae has a vision for the house while he has the construction knowledge, but things start to go awry when he gets involved in the design.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: From Tune-Up to Teardown
programme.desc: A young couple believes they have scored the deal of a lifetime when they acquire an old farmhouse for their first flip. They soon realize, however, that the house is beyond repair. They're left to rebuild from the ground up, risking everything they have.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Funhouse Flip
programme.desc: Two friends think they have hit the jackpot when they nab a large house in Westport, CT as their first flip. They soon realize, however, that the house has more quirks than they expected and the seemingly simple flip turns into a nightmare.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Home Is Where the Hearth Is
programme.desc: A couple decides to flip a house they have admired for years in Henderson, TX. But, when their timeline extends beyond their expectations, they are forced to move into the active renovation site in order to keep things moving and cut costs.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: I Now Pronounce You Flippers
programme.desc: A young couple simultaneously plans a wedding and flips their first house together in Miami, FL. While they thought they would save money, their inexperience ends up delaying them at every turn leading them to dip into their wedding budget.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: No Gutters, No Glory
programme.desc: A young married couple has decided to flip a house with the help of her brother. While the flip starts off well, the project soon falls behind. The guys want to move quickly but she is concerned that important details are being overlooked.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Pipe Shelving Dreams
programme.desc: A husband and wife decide to flip an enormous log cabin in South Carolina, but they soon realize that they have very different interests. She is focused on the design features while he worries that construction projects are left incomplete.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: The Nails 'n the Coughin'
programme.desc: Lifelong friends set out to flip their first house together in their hometown of Overland, Missouri. While one has past experience renovating houses, the other is a total newbie.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Tropic Blunder
programme.desc: A mother-daughter team flips their first house on the beautiful island of Kauai, HI. While the flipping newbies have real estate experience, a surprise visit from a building inspector quickly gets them off track.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flipping Over Cabinets
programme.desc: A daughter enlists her mom as her partner for a flip in East Tennessee. They have big hopes for the renovation but their methods clash when the daughter wants to move through projects quickly instead of following her mother's tested methods.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Yellow and Brown Mess
programme.desc: Nicole finds another house in an up and coming neighbourhood that needs her attention. Fighting the onset of colder weather, she must first tackle an exterior makeover, replacing the icky yellow and brown paint job.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Breaking the Woodwork Rules
programme.desc: Nicole begins work on the interior of the Case Ave house and is faced with a living and dining room full of gorgeous woodwork and original pocket doors that have been painted over the years.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Five-Star Foyer
programme.desc: Nicole takes the dark and dim front entryway and opens it up, removing soffits, repairing original stained glass windows, and hunting for salvaged parts to rebuild the fabulous staircase.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Sensational Second Floor
programme.desc: The bedrooms and bathroom on the second floor desperately need Nicole's attention. She must deal with water-damaged walls, old carpet and vinyl covering the hardwood, and a tiny, dirty bathroom that needs an updated shower.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Breakthrough
programme.desc: The Case Ave house is almost complete, and Nicole has saved the most difficult task for last - figuring out a functional layout for the cramped kitchen.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: New Project, New Headache
programme.desc: When a hundred-year-old Victorian home that Nicole wants to renovate sells to other buyers, she convinces them to let her be involved as they work to get it back on the market.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bathroom Redux
programme.desc: With the exterior of the Harriet Project completely restored, Nicole and the guys move inside and begin demolition to prepare for pluming and electrical work.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Conundrums
programme.desc: Nicole searches for a set of salvaged cabinets to use in the Harriet Project's upper unit kitchen. With her own house still up for sale, Nicole visits the historical society to see if she can discover any new information about the property.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Miami
programme.desc: Ali travels to Miami and breaks his fast with a classic Cuba staple: empanadas. He then samples some fruits of the sea, with right-off-the-boat mahi mahi sandwiches and a fisherman's stew.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Albuquerque
programme.desc: While Albuquerque is known for hatch green chile and New Mex cuisine, Ali Khan discovers a lot more behind the hype. Ali goes sweet on a vegan waffle that delivers like a decadent desert; then makes way for the best green chile cheeseburger in town.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Motor City's Mouthwatering Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes reality television star Kendra Wilkinson on a whirlwind food and beer tour of Detroit to introduce her to one of the country's most resurgent cities.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Whole Hog
programme.desc: Michael Symon smokes a whole hog for a juicy pulled pork sandwich in Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sausages, Franks and Dogs
programme.desc: In Sagaponack, N.Y., Michael Symon heads to a smokehouse where succulent, slow-smoked pork ribs are mopped with a tangy, citrus barbecue sauce. In Columbus, Ohio, there's a beefy burger topped with smoky kielbasa.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Fix Four Ways
programme.desc: Michael begins his meat-seeking journey in Lockhart, Texas, where one family remains at the forefront of America's greatest barbecue after four generations. Next, he swings over to a British-style joint in Brooklyn where they use lobster meat.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: In the Pits
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is travelling cross-country celebrating the art of pit cooking. In Michigan, Roger meets up with Andy Shundlich of Epicure Catering, helping cook a classic Italian pig roast in his brick-lined pit.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Desserts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking skips straight to the sweets as he dives headlong into the 15 best desserts offered in the United States. From the rich and chocolatey to the fruity and flavourful.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amman
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the rich and welcoming dishes of Amman, Jordan. The city's multicultural influences have created a culinary scene steeped in hospitality. Andrew samples some of the more well-known dishes such as towers of goat and veggies and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Sicily
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern samples Sicily's fried street eats, classic cannoli and unique pizza.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: Seafood and Sasquatch in Seattle
programme.desc: In the Pacific Northwest, Debi Mazar, Gabriele Corcos and family are on the hunt for fresh seafood -- and Bigfoot! At the world-famous Pike Place Fish Market in Seattle, Gab tries his hand at the famous fish toss and grabs some lunch.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: A San Francisco Pop-Up Treat
programme.desc: The family is headed to Napa Valley to throw a pop-up party in a friend's vineyard. They stop in San Francisco to grab some salami and porchetta.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: Fear and Cooking in the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: On the way to the Grand Canyon, Debi Mazar, Gabriele Corcos and family stop to pick local ingredients at Agritopia, eat where the locals do at Liberty Market, and attempt to fill their RV at one of the oldest gas stations around.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: Cowboys Cook It Better in Texas
programme.desc: Gabriele Corcos and family drive through Texas, stopping by Snow's BBQ, the Zubik House food truck and an authentic Texas boot shop.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: Motor City Deb-Olition Derby
programme.desc: Debi Mazar loves Motown, classic cars and American history, so it’s only fitting that she, Gabriele Corcos and their family stop in Detroit. The family heads over to Eastern Market where they meet with Chef Phil Jones.

programme.title: Extra Virgin Americana: Shark Sighting on the Cape
programme.desc: Debi Mazar takes her family to the Mayflower replica in Cape Cod, Mass., to show them a piece of their family history. They also have lunch at the Sunbird Food Truck, and go on Gabriele Corcos's planned adventure -- oyster farming!

programme.title: Unique Eats: Ice Cream
programme.desc: If you like ice cream, you will be wowed by these unique treats. How about bourbon and corn flakes flavoured scoops at Humphry Slocombe? Or the sweets at Sweet Rose Creamery where everything from the cones to the chocolate chips are made from scratch.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Cupcakes
programme.desc: We'll take you from coast to coast to taste the most unique cupcakes in the country. Indulge in artisanal cupcakes paired with beer and wine; stuff yourself with custard-filled cupcakes.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Chocolate
programme.desc: Give in to your chocolate cravings at these hotspots.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Desserts
programme.desc: Visit a pie shop in Brooklyn where pies are sold by the slice and are sold out in minutes.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Happy Birthday
programme.desc: Michael McKean makes everyone's birthday wishes come true as he celebrates the best holiday of the year. He discovers that birthday cake was born during a revolution and that a bowl of Chinese noodles can bring you more birthdays to celebrate.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Game Night
programme.desc: Michael McKean goes into the wild to hunt for juicy game meat myths and fresh fish fibs. He calls foul on duck a l'orange with its so-called French origins and throws a line at wicked tuna to find out how we got hooked on tuna melts.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Wicked Good
programme.desc: Michael McKean celebrates Halloween by investigating dishes that are so good they're downright wicked! He's uncovering rhubarb pie's paranormal proclivities and does a background check on ramen with its racy rap sheet.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Baked Goodies
programme.desc: Michael McKean throws the carb-free diet out the window and uncovers the stories behind our favorite baked goodies. He starts by revealing that cupcakes are edible equations and explaining how the whoopie pie nearly caused a civil war.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics VII: Don't Be Chicken of Dumplings
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes on the classic American soup that divides the country, and his family.

programme.title: Good Eats: Wonton Ways
programme.desc: The humble wonton skin may look exotic but it's also the most versatile pasta you can invite into your kitchen.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Strawberry to Silver Dollar

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Mansion/A Doozy Night of Mystery
programme.desc: The gang spends a night in Goofy's uncle's haunted mansion. Mr. Doozy invites everyone to his hotel for a fancy dinner party but a family heirloom goes missing!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Quest/ Llama Drama

programme.title: Muppet Babies Playdate: Kermit's Cookie Caper
programme.desc: Muppet Babies shorts!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cousin Cody/ Hissy's Lost To

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race

programme.desc: Themes of power and politics play out within a rich and dysfunctional family.

programme.desc: Examine the lives of a group of football players, their families, friends and handlers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Klondike Shock
programme.desc: Parker gets an unexpected shock after test panning his first-ever Klondike claim. Later, Todd uses chemicals to break a monster boulder and Tony nearly loses a crew member on the second dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Bid for Independence
programme.desc: Tony's operation hits a wall after teardown issues and Todd's son Hunter demands a new claim site for the future. Later, Parker attempts to go off on his own but Tony isn't keen on the idea.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Judgement Day
programme.desc: The big day for Todd and Parker's 100-ounce bet has arrived and while Parker is chasing a record-breaking $7.2-million season, Todd is desperately trying to keep his crew from falling apart. Meanwhile, Tony tries to beat the mighty Yukon freeze.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Old Discipline, New Technology
programme.desc: The miners reveal the many issues they've faced in the Klondike and reflect on how they got where they are. Later, experts help the miners work more efficiently with modern technology and mechanical innovations.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Old Discipline, New Technology
programme.desc: The miners reveal the many issues they've faced in the Klondike and reflect on how they got where they are. Later, experts help the miners work more efficiently with modern technology and mechanical innovations.

programme.desc: The big day for Todd and Parker's 100-ounce bet has arrived and while Parker is chasing a record-breaking $7.2-million season, Todd is desperately trying to keep his crew from falling apart. Meanwhile, Tony tries to beat the mighty Yukon freeze.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Hoffman's Ghosts
programme.desc: New mine boss Rick is buckling under debt, if he's going to prove himself to his crew he needs to get his first gold weigh. Parker attempts a treacherous river crossing and Tony Beets hits a snag removing a massive piece of his million-dollar dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Hazard Pay
programme.desc: Rick needs a quick fix from Freddy Dodge to keep his season on track. Parker races to get his second wash plant running, but struggles. Tony needs to re-float his sunken dredge and turns to a familiar face from the Hoffman crew for a solution.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Stormageddon
programme.desc: Torrential rains hit the Klondike and Parker and Rick battle to save their mining operations from being flooded out. Tony sends son Mike on his first voyage as Captain on his tug the Kid Commando.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Megamorphosis
programme.desc: Parker's biggest wash plant collapses. Rick makes a shocking discovery and asks his dad for help. A crucial piece comes crashing down as Tony dismantles his dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Father's Day
programme.desc: Rick and his dad battle together to open a new cut. Parker struggles with mechanical breakdowns. Tony dismantles his Dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Resurrection
programme.desc: Dean keeps the claim running when the flu brings Parker's operation to its knees. Rick's mechanic Carl is acting weird. Tony hits rock bottom.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Devil's Deadline
programme.desc: Rick is forced to ask Tony for help and Parker runs a 24-hour test of his ground and suffers another washplant failure. Tony hauls the final piece of his million-dollar second dredge from Thistle Creek and prepares to rebuild it.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Big Dreams
programme.desc: Rick and Freddy risk sacrificing thousands in gold due to wash plant issues. Meanwhile Parker moves his biggest wash plant and Monica strives toward her 6,000-ounce season dream.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Shut it Down

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: In Sickness and in Health

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: All Hands on Deck
programme.desc: A terrible injury is the result of Parker's time on a jet boat and frozen ground threatens to shut down Rick's season. Later, Tony and his family prepare to rebuild his million-dollar dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Every Last Drop
programme.desc: The Beets family attempts a dangerous crane job while Rick fights frozen ground to keep his season afloat. Later, Parker pushes his plant beyond its limit while trying to get every last bit of gold out.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Miner Details: Pushing Big Red
programme.desc: Parker's wash plant Big Red is running dry as he approaches his $7.2-million target. Later, Rick prepares to run 24/7 to hit his goal and Tony makes a dangerous call.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Design Intervention

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Challenge after Challenge
programme.desc: Rebekah is a survivor of the Boston Marathon bombings, and she has just one month to find a dress for her dream wedding. Tall bride Gianna needs a gown with extra length, but she has high expectations for the 'once-in-a-lifetime' dress she envisions.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: All Hands on Deck
programme.desc: Former model Meghan flew from St. Louis to find the perfect dress for her wedding to MLB star Jim Edmonds. Picky fashion buyer Lauren is back for her second visit. GMA meteorologist Ginger Zee tries on her reconstructed Pnina gown for the first time.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Entourage Sabotage

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Black Market Baby Dealer

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Forced Delivery

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Mausoleum Break-in
programme.desc: Jane and Lisa meet the first Hicks baby, Stephen Dilbeck. They work to find his family and solve the mystery of why Hicks sold that first baby. Chris and Dr. Hicks' granddaughter Sallie bust open the mausoleum in search of birth records.

programme.title: River Monsters: Phantom Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade explores the roots of fishing in Africa's Rift Valley and the monsters the first fishermen faced. It's a dangerous place filled with killer crocs, hippos and warring gangs, but at its heart is a worthy prize: the Nile perch.

programme.title: River Monsters: Legend of Loch Ness
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on a mission to track down the famous monster of Loch Ness and to succeed where so many have failed. The journey takes him from the depths of Loch Ness to the volcanoes of Iceland, all in pursuit of the mother of all monsters.

programme.title: River Monsters: Bone Crusher
programme.desc: Jeremy is on the trail of a new river monster after a corpse is found with highly unusual injuries. He also uncovers a spate of disappearances and a mysterious creature patrolling the water.

programme.title: River Monsters: Killer Catfish
programme.desc: An extreme angler searches for a man-eating species of catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters: Coral Reef Killer
programme.desc: When a snorkeler is impaled and killed by an unseen underwater assailant in the waters surrounding the tropical island of Sulawesi in Indonesia, Jeremy Wade travels to the remote islands to investigate a spate of similar attacks across the region.

programme.title: River Monsters: Terror in Paradise
programme.desc: Jeremy travels to the Bahamas after hearing tales of swimmers being ripped from the surface of blue holes surrounding the island; locals attribute the tragic disappearances to the legendary Lusca monster.

programme.desc: An extreme angler searches for a man-eating species of catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters: Piranha
programme.desc: Piranha viciously mutilated a coach full of passengers when it crashed into the Amazon.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Big Croc Diaries
programme.desc: Steve and Terri introduce their favorite crocodiles at Australia Zoo, including a close-up examination of the five biggest crocs they lunge and strike. High-speed film sequences show the tremendous power and speed of each crocodile.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Puppies and Ducklings
programme.desc: Three adorable litters of puppies come of age. The first few months of these Pugs, Mini-Australian Shepherds and Rottweillers' lives will be filled with adventure, including an introduction to the agility course and a lesson in duck-herding.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: He Hates My Boyfriend
programme.desc: An aggressive and unpredictable cat aptly named Bear takes his toll on owner Hannah's love life. Now she must choose to keep her boyfriend or her cat. Then, Matt loves his fiancée but hates her cats and has reached his breaking point.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: Battling FIV
programme.desc: Dr. Dee returns to Ruby for a remote clinic. At Animal House, Dr. Dee treats a malnourished bunny and tackles a Border collie puppy with a congenital issue and a rescued cat who may have an incurable disease called feline immunodeficiency virus.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Head Over Heels
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff returns from a free vet care clinic with a dog who was hit by a car. The owner of a kitten with suspected ringworm gets more than she bargained for. Dr. Jeff treats a family dog with a mysterious lump. And, Dr. Baier falls for a rescued puppy.

programme.title: The Zoo: Andre the Baby Goat
programme.desc: A markhor goat gives birth to Andre, the biggest baby of the year. A baby bat requires human care before it can be reintroduced to its colony. Later, confiscated lizards destined for the pet trade require urgent medical attention.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Baby Elephant
programme.desc: A new elephant calf, Indali, is born but her young half-sister Nandita doesn't welcome the new arrival. Plus, bush dog dad Franco is under pressure as his family grows, and Apple, an onager, a very rare type of wild horse, faces a major operation.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Shelter From the Storm
programme.desc: Tia hires three new parolees, but things quickly take a turn for the worse. A rural shelter threatened with closure needs Tia's help. And a family recovering from the loss of their home and dog in a flood comes to VRC looking for a new best friend.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: New Arrivals
programme.desc: Tania races to rescue a mama dog clinging to life after being in labour for two days. A young woman comes to Villalobos looking for a roommate to share her new home with.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Capybara Casanova
programme.desc: Capybara Lily is pregnant and keepers are hoping for a big litter to liven things up in the all-female group. When newborn Henry emerges, he quickly learns to enjoy having the run of the paddock, and the attention of all the females.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Rhino Romance
programme.desc: Rhino couple Beni and Asha have been kept separate for the last four years while mum Asha has been raising the couple's daughter, Komala. But now Komala is leaving home, and the couple are due to be reunited.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Blacks
programme.desc: The Black family decides to leave their Chicago home for Beverly Hills after they unexpectedly come into some money. Their newfound bliss in L.A. is short-lived, though, when they arrive to discover that it's the annual purge night.

programme.title: Movie: Baggage Claim
programme.desc: With her younger sister's wedding fast approaching, a flight attendant makes it her mission to find a suitable fiancé in 30 days.

programme.title: Movie: Diary of a Mad Black Woman
programme.desc: Helen McCarter has everything going for her, until her wealthy husband admits to having an affair and throws her out of the house. A distraught Helen turns to her family as she learns to stand up on her own two feet.

programme.title: Black-ish: Andre From Marseille
