programme.desc: Dre schools Andre Jr. in the art of 'playing the dozens,' trash talking someone into submission, after he's intimidated by a bully at school, but he succeeds a little too well with his plan; Diane develops a fear of the dark.

programme.title: Black-ish: Parental Guidance
programme.desc: Dre, determined to make up for the no-frills, last-minute wedding he and Bow had, organizes an amazing vow renewal for their 15th anniversary, but when Bow's hippie-dippy parents show up unannounced, bombshells are dropped and old disagreements re-ignite.

programme.title: Black-ish: 30 Something
programme.desc: Dre hurts himself playing basketball right before his 40th birthday. He hands the planning over to his much younger assistant fearing he really is getting too old to be cool. Bow and Ruby face off over who gets Dre the best gift.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sex, Lies and Vasectomies
programme.desc: Bow learns from her colleague that Dre never had the vasectomy a few years back that was supposedly scheduled, so she decides to see if he’ll come clean and tell the truth.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Real World
programme.desc: When Bow reconnects with her college friends on Facebook, she invites them over for an elaborate dinner party and tries to impress them. On the night of the party, Dre ends up learning a lot of new information about Bow's past.

programme.title: Movie: Baggage Claim
programme.desc: With her younger sister's wedding fast approaching, a flight attendant makes it her mission to find a suitable fiancé in 30 days.

programme.title: Movie: Wrong Turn
programme.desc: Young adults get lost in the woods and are hunted by a family of inbred cannibals.

programme.title: Movie: Hansel and Gretel: Witch Hunters
programme.desc: Bounty hunter siblings Hansel and Gretel travel around the world tracking and killing witches. The duo find a clue to their past when they encounter a new kind of evil.

programme.title: Movie: Annabelle: Creation
programme.desc: A group of orphan girls are invited to live with a husband and wife who lost their own daughter in an accident over a decade earlier. When one of the girls finds the dead daughter's doll, it turns out to be possessed and begins terrorizing the innocents.

programme.title: Movie: The Boy
programme.desc: After escaping an abusive relationship, a young woman takes a job as a nanny in a small English community. She soon learns that the 'boy' she'll be caring for is actually a life-sized doll that seems to have a life of its own.

programme.title: Movie: Dead Still
programme.desc: A photographer is bequeathed his father's estate and discovers that the home is haunted by his great grandfather, an evil death photographer who kept his victims on the brink of death in order to take the most tantalizing photos.

programme.title: Movie: Wrong Turn 5: Bloodlines
programme.desc: College students on a road trip through West Virginia have a deadly encounter with cannibals.

programme.title: Van Helsing: Dark Ties
programme.desc: After Violet's attack, Julius and Doc find information that Hansen will do anything to keep quiet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: I Sing the Body Electric
programme.desc: A man feels his kids need an 'electric grandmother' to fill the void of their dead mother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Sounds and Silences
programme.desc: An ex-Navy man runs his business and his household in a rowdy, boisterous maritime fashion. He employs loud bells, whistles, cannon shots and music at all times, which in effect causes his wife to leave him and his sanity to do the same.

programme.title: Van Helsing: Nothing Matters
programme.desc: Vanessa and Susan are pursued through the sewers by mutated, feral vampires. Meanwhile, at the hospital, a hostile takeover has begun.

programme.title: Van Helsing: For Me
programme.desc: The hospital's residents, leg by Vanessa and Axel, take one last stand against Julius and his vampire soldiers. Meanwhile, a civil war seems to be brewing between Dmitri's Death Squad and the other faction of bloodsuckers.

programme.title: Van Helsing: Little Thing
programme.desc: Axel leads the group's survivors to his old military base only to find it abandoned and in disrepair. With vampires closing in all around them, the gang decides to go underground. Meanwhile, Mohamad tries to catch up to Vanessa.

programme.title: Van Helsing: Help Out
programme.desc: Vanessa learns that Axel has been keeping a secret from her concerning her past. Meanwhile, the group is trapped inside an underground lab for military experiments and Rebecca makes a calculated move again the Resistance leadership.

programme.title: Van Helsing: Stay Away
programme.desc: Vanessa and the group are left reeling from the dire events of 'The Farm' when they come upon a band of humans who have brokered a peace with the vampires. Meanwhile, the serial killer's identity is revealed.

programme.title: Movie: Gallowwalkers
programme.desc: A cursed gunman whose victims return from the dead enlists the help of a young sharp shooter to fight by his side against a gang of zombies.

programme.title: Movie: The Haunting in Connecticut 2: Ghosts of Georgia
programme.desc: When Andy Wyrick moves his wife Lisa and daughter Heidi to a historic home in Georgia, they quickly discover they are not the house's only inhabitants.

programme.title: Movie: The Haunting in Connecticut
programme.desc: A family moves to be closer to medical treatment for one of the sons. In the new house they start to experience irrational and supernatural events. They learn the house used to be a mortuary and that paranormal experiments were performed by former owners.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Abandoned Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a short sale property in Long Beach, California, that looks like a promising investment project, save for one small issue: the massive renovations the previous owners began are only partly finished.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Flip With the Enemy
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are busier than ever with their growing business. As a result, when a fellow flipper contacts them about partnering on a house and he wants to split the time, money and profit 50/50, they are very interested.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Fire Sale Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by a homeowner in Costa Mesa, California on a great deal for a 1960's single story home. A good deal in a great neighborhood is exactly what Tarek and Christina look for.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Natural Disaster
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead from their friend and investor, Pete, on a house he's recently purchased. It's situated in an upscale, gated neighbourhood and it's a house Pete can't tackle on his own.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Addition and Subtraction
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Garden Grove, California, that is in need of a major makeover. The house is small and needs a lot of work, but it does have a large yard where they could add an extra bathroom or bedroom.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Ready-to-Flip Ranch
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by an owner in Anaheim, California, looking to sell their three bedroom, two bathroom home. These kind of houses are quick and easy to flip, exactly what the duo are looking for.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Breaking Up
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a house in Torrance, California that is not only in rough shape, but also has known foundation issues.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Risky Business: Mid-century Markup
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a mid-century modern home.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Turf Wars
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina team up with their friend Pete De Best on a house in Yorba Linda, CA. They've flipped houses with Pete and have had success, but he's a major penny pincher, and they must convince him that you have to spend money to make money.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cliff Makeover
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a house in Anaheim, CA, designed by architect Cliff May. Having flipped a Cliff May house before, they're prepared to spend big for a mid-century makeover.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Rotten Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take a gamble on a million-dollar possibility in Anaheim Hills, CA, that is rotted with mold. Tarek wrestles with keeping the project on track while Christina tip-toes around her ex being in a bad mood.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Dark and Dingy
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a good flip in Garden, CA, but Christina is worried that Tarek's penny-pinching will prevent them from making the necessary design decisions to maximize profits.

programme.title: House Hunters: The Battle of the Southern Charmer
programme.desc: A real estate lawyer and a real estate broker battle over which house will be the better Southern charmer for their growing family in North Carolina.

programme.title: House Hunters: New Home on Tap
programme.desc: Two surgeons and their large family are moving to be closer to her parents. A home that is functional for their six children is her main priority, while he's more focused on the adults and wants a bar in the basement.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Nashville: Frankenhouse
programme.desc: Flippers Page and DeRon uncover layer after layer of hidden problems as they tackle a 100-year-old house with multiple additions. They pull out all the stops to make sense of the mismatched elements and bring the house back to life.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Nashville: The Abandoned Rehab
programme.desc: DeRon and Page set out to breathe new life into an unfinished renovation and discover that a house with no walls can still have hidden problems.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Nashville: The Renovation Shuffle
programme.desc: To make sense of a Southern-style cottage with a bizarre floor plan, Page and DeRon must relocate every room. They hope to add square footage and value by turning a cramped loft into a spacious bonus room.

programme.title: Love It or List It: A Couple Debates Whether Their Home Can House Their Future
programme.desc: Eager to start a family, a couple has become divided over their bungalow's ability to house their next chapter.

programme.title: Love It or List It: A Couple Is Concerned Over the Functional Issues in Their Home
programme.desc: Music venue owner, Kevin, purchased this house without his pregnant wife, Nevada, ever walking inside. Now with four kids, Nevada feels the daily frustrations with the functional issues of the home.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Not Enough Bedrooms
programme.desc: Quincy and Don have outgrown their ranch house where they've raised their kids. While Quincy is ready to move, Don loves their neighborhood and wants to make their rancher work. No matter their decision, the couple is desperate for more space at home.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Lackluster Lake House
programme.desc: A couple with an idyllic yet quirky house near a lake is now feeling cramped after their family doubled in size. The house doesn't provide enough private space for everyone.

programme.title: Love It or List It: All Work and No Place for It
programme.desc: A couple bought their home in a rush, and after painting, putting on an addition and living in it for a while, they are still bothered by too many functional issues.

programme.title: House Hunters: Ornate vs. Simple in Chicago
programme.desc: A Chicago couple is searching for a home that's big enough for their growing family. She wants a Victorian with plenty of character, while he'd prefer a traditional Midwestern-style home with clean lines.

programme.title: House Hunters: Vintage House vs. City Loft in Cincinnati
programme.desc: Buyers in Cincinnati are looking to move out of their rental downtown and into a place of their own. She wants a vintage house in a quiet suburban neighborhood, but he loves living downtown and wants a contemporary loft that has that 'new car smell.'

programme.title: House Hunters International: Famous Frenchies in London
programme.desc: What started as fun pictures of French bulldogs on social media quickly turned into two photogenic pups acting as the breadwinners of the family. The family wants to move to West London to take more photos.

programme.title: House Hunters: Detroit Lake Life
programme.desc: Newlyweds set out to buy a lakeside home in the Detroit area. Finding a budget-friendly house on the water, however, may require some unforeseen sacrifices.

programme.title: House Hunters: Spend Big or Fix It Up In Naples, Fl
programme.desc: After recently relocating from Texas to pricey Naples, Florida, a couple is still in sticker shock.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Poolside in Perth, Australia
programme.desc: A British couple enticed by Australian sunshine decides to settle down in Perth to live near her family. Together they will look for a poolside paradise that doesn't cannon-ball their finances.

programme.title: House Hunters: First Home in San Antonio
programme.desc: After years of apartment living, a nurse in San Antonio searches for her first home. She wants the homey feel of a ranch with an open floor plan so she can entertain her friends and host family visits.

programme.title: House Hunters: Doing the Numbers in DC
programme.desc: A mathematician seeks a row house in the pricey Washington, DC, market. He needs his first home to pay for itself, so he's on the hunt for a place with a few extra rooms to rent out.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Not My Child
programme.desc: Steve and Amy head to Jefferson City, MO, where a family has abandoned their new home to escape its intense paranormal activity. Their young daughter is suspected to have been possessed by one of the entities tormenting them.

programme.title: The Dead Files: 'Til Death - Wymore, Nebraska
programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Nebraska to help a woman who believes paranormal activity has taken control of her husband. During her walk, Amy encounters a mischievous trickster whose pranks are becoming more and more vicious.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Taken: Mahwah, New Jersey
programme.desc: Steve and Amy investigate claims that a family of six is being destroyed by paranormal activity and while walking, Amy encounters a woman hell-bent on attacking everyone in the house.

programme.title: The Dead Files: The Blurry Man
programme.desc: Amy and Steve head to Highland Park, IL, where a panic-stricken family claims life in their new home has been been hell on Earth. Steve learns of a murder by a serial killer, while Amy encounters a praying man that morphs into a terrifying monster.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Revealed: Summoning Souls - Starks, Maine
programme.desc: Steve and Amy investigate paranormal activity at a terrified women's home in Starks, Maine.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You: Murder in Stereo
programme.desc: When millionaire Werner Hartmann meets Debra Stover he's smitten and soon marries the young beauty. But their romance becomes a roller coaster when a young tennis pro enters the picture. Soon a deadly plan unfolds into a nearly perfect murder.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You: Mother of All Evils
programme.desc: When Rachael Mullenix moves to California, all she has is her mother Barbara until handsome Ian Allen comes along. A whirlwind romance leaves Barbara vying for Rachael's attention and when buried secrests are unearthed the consequences are fatal.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Wife's Double Life
programme.desc: When a young husband is thrown in jail for the murder of his newlywed wife, most people in their small Oklahoma community believed the case was solved. But odd cell tower records and surprising DNA evidence force investigators to take a second look.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: The Vanishing Clerk
programme.desc: On an Easter Sunday, 18-year-old Heidi Allen vanishes from her convenience store job. Two brothers are arrested for the kidnapping, but only one is convicted. Years later, a chilling new story emerges implicating three other men in the crime.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Home Alone
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Garrett Phillips is attacked while home alone; his killer jumps unseen from a window and investigators are left with a vexing mystery that rattles the village of Potsdam, New York.

programme.title: 48 Hours: To Catch a Genius
programme.desc: A beautiful wife is dead from nicotine poisoning and her husband needs to beat the murder rap.

programme.title: 48 Hours: All-American Murder
programme.desc: Best-selling author James Patterson investigates the life and death of convicted murderer and former New England Patriot's player Aaron Hernandez. In April, 2017, Aaron committed suicide in a Massachusetts prison where he was serving a life sentence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dear Savanna
programme.desc: Dorothy Lee Barnett eluded the FBI for two decades after she fled the United States with her infant daughter in tow. Now, for the first time, Barnett shares her story with us.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Death is in the Heir
programme.desc: Living in Little Washington, North Carolina means you've made it. For one member of a local family though, nothing is ever enough. Old family money combined with a get-rich-quick attitude put deadly targets on everybody's backs.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Burning Love
programme.desc: In Ore City, Texas, firefighters extinguish a burning truck, only to reveal the charred remains of a human corpse inside. It soon becomes apparent this was no accident and that there's something very evil at play.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Fatal Fuse
programme.desc: Police find a homeowner dead in their driveway riddled with bullets. Although one of the victim's family members claims to have witnessed the brutal attack, the alleged chain of events raises more questions than answers.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Blood and Sand
programme.desc: California beauty Pegye meets ace volleyball player Eric on the pristine sands of Newport Beach. With good looks and success they look like they've got it all but hedonism comes at a price, and living the dream quickly becomes a waking nightmare.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Sex, Lies, and Secret Texts
programme.desc: Cassie is a free-spirited bartender when she meets family-guy Brent - the rock to her roll. But a spark this intense is doomed to explode... and a bright light extinguishes in tragedy.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Pablo Escobar: King of Cocaine
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. He met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Inside the Killbox: Fighting the Gulf War
programme.desc: Take a serious look at the most significant military conflict of the late 20th century. Go past the politics of the moment and deep into the actual conduct of the campaign, from Iraq's 1990 invasion of Kuwait to the 1991 cessation of hostilities.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Inside the Killbox: Fighting the Gulf War
programme.desc: Take a serious look at the most significant military conflict of the late 20th century. Go past the politics of the moment and deep into the actual conduct of the campaign, from Iraq's 1990 invasion of Kuwait to the 1991 cessation of hostilities.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.
programme.desc: While the First World War rages on in Europe, a German terrorist cell is waging its own secret war on American soil. When a New York City cop uncovers the plot, he must fight to save his country before it's too late.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Living Room Revamp
programme.desc: Nicole repairs the hardwood floors in both living rooms of the Harriet Project and searches for replica tile to begin restoring a fireplace in the downstairs unit.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Finished Project
programme.desc: With only a few weeks left to finish the Harriet Project, Nicole and the homeowners divide and conquer to complete the lower unit's living room and kitchen. Nicole visits a local high school shop class to work on a radiator cover for the living room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Front Porch Frenzy
programme.desc: Adam and Rachael hire Nicole to fully restore their newly purchased 1920s house. The couple is getting married and need to move into the home in a month, so Nicole must work faster than ever to complete everything on time.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Living Room Overhaul
programme.desc: Continuing her restoration of Adam and Rachael's home, Nicole moves her attention to the living room, where she must restore the beat up hardwood floors.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Tile Terrors
programme.desc: Turning her attention to Adam and Rachael's bathroom, Nicole deals with the many problems that creep up while working with tile in an old house. When she hits a snag, she must figure out a way to make her fixtures fit in the small space.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Countdown
programme.desc: Nicole must finish a kitchen renovation while newlyweds are on their honeymoon.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: In at the Deep End
programme.desc: Nicole cleans up the swimming pool and converts some garage space into a much needed changing room area. Tapping into the sewer line causes more mess than she bargained for, while Nicole also finds some time to take some swimming lessons.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Living Room Cover Up
programme.desc: Nicole takes on the living room and study, restoring the rooms to their former 1904 glory by polishing up the original woodworking details in the rooms.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Detroit Auction House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis wins a house sight-unseen at auction and plans to revitalize the eyesore with painting, landscaping and restoring the custom woodwork. She faces a challenge when replacing missing details, including original windows and hardwood flooring.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: Condemned Cottage
programme.desc: An over-ambitious couple bit off more than they could chew with their cottage fixer-upper. With plants growing out of the foundation and peeled paint on the siding, it's up to Chris and Sara to save this uninhabitable eyesore.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bus Life Ever
programme.desc: Charlie Kern is passionate about converting buses into amazing homes, including his own school bus, or 'skoolie/' His current projects include a 35-foot flat-nosed bus for a young woman who spends life on the road making and selling circus equipment.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Alaskan Mobile Home
programme.desc: Mike falls further behind schedule due to wet weather and unforeseen obstacles. Dave and Hans get a surprise visit and much needed help to finish the cabin. Adam disassembles his cabin at the log yard and begins transporting it to his build site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Big Lift
programme.desc: Mike and his team get the rafters and roofing underway but with no lack of challenges. Dave and Hans are on their own with setting the extremely heavy ridge beam until help arrives. Adam successfully transports all of his logs to his build site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Lost in Logs
programme.desc: Dave and Hans have two 700-hundred pound ridgepoles to set. Running out of weatherproofing Mike is forced to forge ahead in dodgy weather. For builder Adam, a faster pace comes to a screeching halt when two crucial logs go missing.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Bush Alaska Approved
programme.desc: The tides become the ultimate decider for Dave, Hans, and Steve, and send Steve to the workshop. For builder Adam and his family, the weather can't dampen their excitement as they finish their cabin. Mike is racing the first snowfall.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Game On
programme.desc: The three build teams kick off their builds in remote Alaskan settings. Bruce Chambers and his crew begin a cabin on LaTouche Island. Mark Sams and his crew begin a cabin in Freshwater Bay. Dave Poppert and his family begin a compound on Point MacKenzie.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Piece of the Pie
programme.desc: At Bruce Chambers' build, running out of supplies has put the build at a standstill. Mark Sams and his crew are challenged by getting their foundation level and square. Dave Poppert and his family deal with record setting heat.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Wrong Stuff
programme.desc: At Bruce Chambers' build site on LaTouche Island, their worst nightmare becomes a reality when their backup generator dies. On Mark Sams' build in Freshwater Bay, near Hoonah, one of his crew is missing, and Mark hopes for the best.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Stormy Weather
programme.desc: At Bruce Chambers' build on LaTouche Island, getting the log walls up continues to be a nightmare, but Bruce finds the perfect way to let off some steam. On Chichagof Island, Mark Sams and his crew endure pounding rain that makes the build miserable.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Seasonal Squeeze
programme.desc: The three teams continue their builds in unique, remote Alaskan settings. At Bruce Chambers' build on LaTouche Island, the team wrestles giant glulam beams into place and the situation turns disastrous after a poorly cut beam pushes out an entire wall.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts off in Chippewa Falls, Wis., at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. The Wisconsin woods are the inspiration for the loaded Campfire Burger, and the state's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deep-Fried Inferno
programme.desc: Where there's smoke, there's fire, and Noah Cappe is ready to have his taste buds fired up at the Spencerport Volunteer Firemen's Association Carnival in New York. From the Flaming Weck to the Five Alarm Fries, there's plenty of sizzle.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Cheat Day
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson gears up for his favourite day of the week- cheat day! It's a full-on sugar and carb overload with everything from cakes to shakes.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: By the Sea
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the best seafood by the seashore. Whether it's baked, broiled, fried or served in a shell or on a bun, these fresh-out-of-the-water wonders have hungry diners wishing they were seeing waves.

programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle

programme.desc: Mike visits a Chicken Farm to see how eggs make it to the store. There, he finds out that 1.4 million chickens equal a lot of poo, which he gets the chance to clean. Later, Mike learns how dirty dirt becomes clean dirt as he sterilizes soil in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Locomotive Builder
programme.desc: Mike heads to MotivePower in Boise, Idaho to build and restore locomotives for his 200th dirty job.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Aerial Tram Greaser

programme.desc: Theresa turns 50 and enters a weightlifting competition. A woman who claims her brother was murdered by NFL player Aaron Hernandez visits Long Island. Theresa confides in a friend that she and Larry are going through a rough patch.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Freezing Theresa
programme.desc: 'Shark Tank' shark Barbara Corcoran gets a reading with Theresa. At a fundraiser, Theresa channels an accident victim for the distraught police officer who couldn't save him. Theresa reads a man while she's inside a cryogenic freezing chamber.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm Not the Size of a Hanger!
programme.desc: Southern bride Danielle gets some help from her girlfriends in the quest to find the perfect glamorous gown. Jen is having a beer-themed wedding, but wants her dress to be more traditional. Katie worries her large assets won't fit in her wedding gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Won the Battle Against My Twin!
programme.desc: Bride Margo struggles to get her twin sister's approval of the dresses she tries on. Brenda needs all four of her sisters to agree with her dress choice. Amy is trying on her super sexy gown, but worries her twin sister will think it's too revealing.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: What Does Martha Think?
programme.desc: The wedding guru herself, Martha Stewart, visits Kleinfeld. She's helping bride Bailey decide if she truly chose her perfect dress. Meanwhile, bride Jessica is so indecisive she may not find a gown, and Crystal wants impossible alterations.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Sasha Dress
programme.desc: 'High School Musical' star Corbin Bleu joins his fiancée, Sasha, to find her dream dress. Bride Katie wants a classic ball gown, but her fiancé would like something sexier.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is Your Day
programme.desc: War veteran and bride-to-be Alicia has served in both Iraq and Afghanistan. Now, it's Randy's turn to give back to her by surprising this shocked bride with a VIP day at Kleinfeld. The surprises keep getting bigger and better all day long.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Am a Bride on a Budget
programme.desc: Lauren has a $2,000 budget but is in love with a dress that will blow that budget to shreds. Shoshana is a struggling actress, paying for her own dress to complete her special day. Sara is way over budget and has to convince her father it's worth it.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Bling, Lace and Cleavage!
programme.desc: Krystle loves attention, but her friends may not agree on her over-the-top sexy dress. Maria wants a pure white princess or mermaid gown, but shocks her pastor father with a sexy sheer bodice. Jaclyn faces a major dress dilemma.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm a Legacy
programme.desc: Joelle tries on her mother's 1987 Kleinfeld dress, but is not sure if she is ready to walk down the aisle '80s style. Randy and Antonella know it's going to be a rough appointment when bride LeAnne declares she's the ultimate anti-bride!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I've Stalked This Dress on Instagram
programme.desc: Chic designer Hayley Paige is getting married and makes three one-of-a-kind dresses for her big day. Bride Elisabeth comes to Kleinfeld with one goal: to buy her dream Hayley Paige gown. LaKesha, a superfan of designer Lazaro, gets a shock at the salon.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not Afraid to Try New Things

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Come on in, Grandma!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: That Looks Like a Torture Device

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Couch Creature
programme.desc: A woman believes her neighbours want to kill her; a man is near death after an arrow pierces his chest; two women with swollen abdomens refuse to explain the cause of their pain.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Punched!
programme.desc: An injured ER doctor puts on a show to stop a patient's violent outbursts; a man's heart fails as his daughter and girlfriend fight; on Christmas Eve, the family of a patient with severe burns prays for a miracle.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Shredded!
programme.desc: A man is rushed to the ER, apparently clawed by a tiger, but he won't reveal the true cause of his injuries. A patient says he's been shot in the head, but the bullet is nowhere to be found. A doctor believes that a woman who is brain dead can be saved.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Zombie Uprising
programme.desc: A Halloween zombie with a problem below the belt mystifies doctors. Later, a doctor makes mistake that amazingly explains a patient's condition.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Rob Riggle

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XLI
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo attend a Russian Talent Show, check out some nasty kids marks and discover that 'that world's your weapon.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXXI

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: Keith vs. Goliath
programme.desc: This gigantic house sits on an oversized lot in one of Orlando's best neighborhoods. The team agree to flip the house and sell off half of the huge lot. However, issues force the team to rethink their design and everything goes out the window.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Paranoia
programme.desc: Rosa enlists Jake to help change Terry's disapproving opinion about her fast-moving relationship with Adrian Pimento. But their love for each other is put on hold when Pimento thinks someone from his past is trying to kill him.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Maximum Security
programme.desc: In an attempt to get information on a criminal operation, Amy has to go undercover at a women's prison and befriend one of the prisoners. Meanwhile back at the precinct, Holt and the team plan a fake funeral in an attempt to catch a hitman.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Bureau
programme.desc: With Pimento's life still in peril, Captain Holt calls on an old friend in the FBI to help with a seemingly impossible heist. Meanwhile, Amy makes a breakthrough while undercover, and Terry and Gina discover an information leak in the Nine-Nine.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Halloween IV
programme.desc: It's Halloween in the Nine-Nine which can only mean one thing: heist time. This year, the squad members pull out all the stops in their quest to win the new defending title of 'Ultimate Detective Slash Genius.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Champions Special

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Show Some Respect
programme.desc: Dave Hill confesses who he has on the brain, J.P. McDale tales a shot at Dave's career, and Ali Kolbert reveals her side hustle.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: White Tasty
programme.desc: Tone Bell schools a lucky person on the street, Jade Catta-Preta goes hard at Tone's love life, and Noah Gardenswartz spots someone very special in the crowd.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Demo Crazy
programme.desc: Sara Schaefer knows what not to say in a search party, Joel Kim Booster explains why your grandpa doesn't trust him, and Yassir Lester knows all about Joel's longest relationship.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Laugh Riot
programme.desc: Learn how to play the most epic game of mattress dominos ever, and see why staircase sledding never gets old.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Fools on Parade
programme.desc: See why flying a kite isn't a breeze, marvel at a grown man getting a billy goat back massage, and watch a construction worker stain himself pink.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: World Wide Whackos
programme.desc: Find out how a little eye makeup can help you pull off a prank that's both hilarious and scary. Plus, watch things go downhill in a hurry when people try to back that thang up.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Pranks and Funny Fails
programme.desc: Find out what happens when you get caught in a no-selfie zone, why mailing humans is the way of the future, and how cuddling is an art form of its own.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performer 11
programme.desc: A rapper whose balance is worse than his rhymes, a flaming embarrassment of a TV chef, a dancer who lost her sexy a long time ago and a weather man with serious arachnophobia.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 12
programme.desc: Butter-fingered figure-skaters, busted-ass break dancers, klutzy beauty pageant contestants and comedians who are only funny because they're so not funny.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 13
programme.desc: Counting down 20 of the dumbest performers you've ever seen including a woman dancing in butter and team mascots gone wild.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 14
programme.desc: Featuring a countdown of some of the dumbest acts on stage. Performers from a lion tamer to a woman with a special talent, each one is special in their own way.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: The Lizard Law
programme.desc: Never before seen footage; a severed camera cable; the magic team messing with Michael during a trick.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Serious Deja Vu
programme.desc: The trick that Michael initially thought was too goofy. The trick that took nearly a week of rehearsals and tested Michael's memory.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Out of Control
programme.desc: Find out how Michael makes himself sound like an expert, what he loves collecting and how the magic team surprised the rest of the crew.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: The Framing Canon
programme.desc: Find out which magic team member knows how to ride a unicycle, what trick almost used an alpaca and which trick nearly resulted in Michael slicing open his neck.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Football
programme.desc: Adam hits the gridiron to show why the playoffs rarely determine which team is best, and he explores how sports drink hydration myths are putting kids at risk.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Animals
programme.desc: Adam explores how purbred dogs are genetic monsters created by bored Victorians, and reveals how domestic cats are overpopulated lethal killing machines.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Wild West
programme.desc: Adam illustrates how, despite its macho man reputation, prostitutes actually helped settle the West. He then goes on to explain why the 'All-American Cowboy' is a myth, and that the real hero of the west wasn't a person at all - it was air conditioning.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Going Green
programme.desc: Adam meets a young dad who is on a personal mission to save the world and end climate change. We learn why the famous 'Crying Indian' PSA wasn't quite what we thought.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Hospital
programme.desc: Inflated hospital costs have created an unfair system, reckless antibiotic prescriptions makes them worthless, and you might not need a mammogram.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Dating
programme.desc: Adam swipes right on knowledge by exposing the flaws in dating sites. Plus, alpha males, and wolves, don't exist, and personality tests are a failure.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Amvox 73
programme.desc: Find out what location was right next to an airport and a golf course, which animals kept getting loose on set and what other animal was camera shy.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Take the Mirror
programme.desc: Find out what happened when a scorpion got loose during magic rehearsal, what money truck sent the crew scrambling and what fruity trick had a British influence.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Warthogs, WogHearts, and Hogwarts
programme.desc: Find out what happens when Michael tricks an off-duty cop with a fake bill, which prop kept malfunctioning and which one was used in an unaired sitcom pilot.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Drone Care
programme.desc: Find out what trick was almost cancelled due to rain; which insect attacked the magic team during rehearsal; and what is Michael's shirt size.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Movie: It's Complicated
programme.desc: While attending their son's graduation in New York, a divorced couple rediscovers their feelings for each other. They later return to their homes believing that their affair is over, but soon find themselves continuing the relationship.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pubs and Grub
programme.desc: Guy hits up a classic British pub in St. Louis, serving up gourmet Grilled Cheese, and a brewing station in Kill Devil Hills N.C. making righteous shrimp.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unexpected Eats
programme.desc: Guy is in search of the most unique offerings of everyday favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Traditional Gone Wild
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's digging into some dishes like mama made, if she had a wild imagination.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pound Cake to Pot Pie
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's pullin' in for a mishmash of comfort food. In Philadelphia, the low country joint dishing out unique North African chicken and sour cream pound cake.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cross-Country Classics
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's roadtrippin' all over the country for some home-style cooking. In Boston, the funky neighbourhood joint cranking out Southern staples, like chicken and waffles and off-the-hook tots.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fresh Fish and Funky Chicken
programme.desc: Guy is hitting the road for some outrageous seafood and tasty chicken. In Des Moines, Iowa, the trophy-winning barbecue joint is dishing out unique wings and an apple dumpling dessert.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Griddles n' Vittles
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headed west for barbecue and beyond. In Los Angeles, a food court gem grills up homemade chorizo and a Yucatan turkey special. Then, in Las Vegas, Nevada, two funky joints fire up the grill.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Seafood and Shawarma
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's taking an eclectic, global-infused tour of Flavortown. In Minneapolis, an Italian spot carries on a fun, family pizza-making tradition, and in Miami, a champion chef cooks Haitian classics like griot, snapper and octopus.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bagels, Biscuit and Boar
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diggin' into all kinds of flavour, starting in Santa Fe, N.M., at a pub serving comfort grub like chicken and biscuits and in-the-shell clam chowder. A spot in Reno, Nev., on its game with dishes like a double elk chop and wild boar spaetzle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Wings 'n' Things
programme.desc: Ain't no thing but a chicken wing in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, when Guy Fieri stops by to taste a couple of new eats they've added. A Nashville barbecue spot has a new take on the old standard wings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Eating Up New Orleans
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's taking a tasty tour of New Orleans, Louisiana. He rolls into a legit butcher shop with a funky take on the Big Easy's comfort food flavors.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Chili Three Ways
programme.desc: Guy Fieri crosses the border to Vancouver, British Columbia, to check in on an authentic Chinese place and see if their thousand chili chicken is as spicy as it sounds.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Succulent Sandwiches
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diggin' into succulent sandwiches! In Oakland, a real-deal butchery stacking up killer cheesesteak and off-the-chain chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Greats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's going global with international flavours. In Miami, a funky Haitian joint cooks up island favourites like griot and fresh red snapper. In Los Angeles, a 70-year-old Italian spot serves up their legendary spins on pizza and lasagna.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked and Stacked
programme.desc: Duff Goldman makes a guest appearance at Michael Symon's favorite Baton Rouge, La. smokehouse that boasts a pork belly hoagie so outrageous it has to be shared. Next up in St. Louis, a big fat Greek burger ignites Michael's cultural soul, and in Austin.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue in the Big Apple
programme.desc: Michael Symon is joined by his good buddy Michael Strahan at their favorite New York City burger spot. They bounce around The Big Apple dining on meatball sliders, succulent St. Louis style ribs and pastrami-topped pizza.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: The Savory Side Of Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is whipping up a crowd-pleasing brunch of classically sweet dishes reimagined with savory flavors, like stuffed French toast with gruyere, mustard greens and double-smoked bacon, ham and cheese scones.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like A Pro: Seafood
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing all her seafood secrets and pro tips, starting with her recipe for Cioppino, a satisfying one-pot stew with cod, shrimp, scallops and mussels.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Fearless Food
programme.desc: Ina Garten is tackling daunting dishes with easy techniques, from a perfectly risen souffle a l'orange to overcoming pastry fears with her totally professional-looking Anna's tomato tart.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Super-Sized Sunday
programme.desc: Giada invites friends over to watch the big game and makes gourmet super-sized versions of some of our favorite game foods, including a three-way tie sandwich, a bar made up of game day dips and chips, and spicy Calabrian shrimp.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha Goes to Boot Camp
programme.desc: Trisha and her friend, Natalie, suit up for boot camp. Afterwards, they whip up a menu low on calories but high on flavor, including kale chips, lemon orzo chicken soup, chickpea salad sandwiches and an angel food cake with grapefruit compote.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Mexican Fiesta
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites her friends to a fun afternoon Mexican fiesta. She puts her spin on Mexican classics with recipes that include avocado salad, red and green charred salsa, cheater churros and steak fajitas.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Pizza Ree-A
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's sharing recipes from her pizza place in town. For takeout with a difference, she makes foolproof pizza dough, garlic butter and a no-cook pizza sauce and uses them for her triple pepperoni pizza and her signature pie, pizza Ree-a.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Care Package 101
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shares the fundamentals of creating care packages while putting one together for Alex. Lemon raspberry pound cake, snickerdoodles, brown butter granola clusters, strawberry fruit roll-ups and custom-made hot chocolate mix gets wrapped up.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Fall Fan Favorites
programme.desc: The chefs share new twists on viewers' fall favourites with dishes like Sunny Anderson's mini meatloaves cheat sheet and Geoffrey Zakarian's pumpkin, bacon and caramelized onion quiche.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood brings the American county fair tradition to her own backyard. She prepares tasty fairground favourites before her neighbourhood friends and their kids come by to join the fun.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Burger Bash
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges his talented chef friends to take a burger beyond the basic patty and bun. Antonia Lofaso combines sirloin and brisket with braised oxtail for an intensely meaty burger and whips orange juice for a crisp Garibaldi cocktail.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: All Things Weird and Wonderful
programme.desc: Comedian John Henson hosts as the six remaining bakers’ team up to create desserts that pay tribute to the iconic Addams Family -- scary on the outside and sweet on the inside.

programme.title: Halloween Wars: Zombie Dating Show
programme.desc: Five teams made up of an expert pumpkin carver, a cake artist and a sugar master create amazing and tasty Halloween-themed displays that mix fear and romance in a depiction of a zombie dating show.

programme.title: Halloween Cake-Off: Infestation!
programme.desc: Duff challenges the bakers to create cakes that have become infested and decayed. The final three head home to build their masterpieces made to rot before the judges' eyes. The final cakes are scream worthy with shocking transformations.

programme.title: Haunted Gingerbread Showdown: Calling all Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Host Clinton Kelly challenges three gingerbread artists to create pieces celebrating the 35th anniversary of the smash hit movie Ghostbusters.

programme.title: Around the Horn
programme.desc: Host, Tony Reali, and sports reporters representing each time zone via satellite, banter about their local and national sports stories. Reali hosts and keeps score on every comment from his studio where he is connected to each columnist's newsroom.

programme.title: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: Journalists Tony Kornheiser and Mike Wilbon face off on the sports world's hottest topics within a provocative and speedy format devoted exclusively to sports opinions and headline issues.

programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: Join SportsCenter for a review of the day's scores, highlights, commentary and feature stories from major sporting events.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Along Came Jodi

programme.title: Snapped: Frances Truesdale
programme.desc: The 1988 roadside murder of a man in Virginia sends investigators down a path fraught with doubts and dead ends, until a long-buried secret is unearthed hundreds of miles away revealing decades old secrets.

programme.title: Snapped: Jodi Arias
programme.desc: Through gripping firsthand accounts and never-before-seen interviews with Travis’ friends and experts who covered the case; starting with the couple's deadly love affair to the media frenzy surrounding the trial.

programme.title: Snapped: Eric Copple

programme.title: Snapped: Barbara Garcia
programme.desc: Trick-or-treaters in a small Indiana town have no idea that the sweet grandmother passing out candy is also hiding a deadly secret in her garage.

programme.title: Snapped: Daniel Clay
programme.desc: After a massive Halloween bash ends with a young woman’s mysterious disappearance, a tiny farming town fears that evil stalks its fields.

programme.title: Snapped: Helen Moore
programme.desc: Helen's boyfriend goes missing just as authorities find a dismembered torso, but is it case closed or 20 years later, is Helen's new story a game changer.

programme.title: Snapped: Elizabeth Reynolds
programme.desc: A volatile couple keeps trying to one-up each other, and both end up fighting for their lives.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Killer Detective

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: The Sinister Minister
programme.desc: The beloved wife of a respected pastor dies in a tragic car accident. The community mourns until a congregant commits suicide, triggering an investigation that brings deadly secrets to light.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Investigated By Paul Holes: What Happened to Morgan Ingram?
programme.desc: Paul Holes re-examines the suspicious death of Morgan Ingram. Her parents claim she was stalked and eventually murdered, but law enforcement closed her case as a suicide by overdose.

programme.title: Golden State Killer: Main Suspect
programme.desc: After a decades long crime spree terrorizing California, a DNA breakthrough has led detectives to a suspect in one of the most famous cases in history. Stephanie Gosk, and detective Paul Holes, trace the life of suspect, Joe DeAngelo.

programme.title: Snapped: Melissa Patterson
programme.desc: After an endearing World War II veteran and family man is laid to rest from apparent natural causes, a surprise witness surfaces with murder accusations, sparking a police investigation into a devious predator.

programme.title: Snapped: Theresa Voss
programme.desc: When a body is discovered in the trunk of a burning car, police in Ohio sift through the ashes for clues... but as the years slip by without an arrest, will a killer evade capture.

programme.title: Snapped: Judy Flanagan
programme.desc: The discovery of a body in a wildlife management area launches a murder investigation that forces a group of friends into the hot seat. When police think they find a surprising clue and possible hidden message the case breaks wide open.

programme.title: Snapped: Rebecca Braswell
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a military hero tests the bonds of military camaraderie and unravels a myriad of secrets, lies and hidden identities.

programme.title: Snapped: Pamela Lanier
programme.desc: A woman's innocence is called into question after her husband dies from a mysterious malady and encourages detectives to take a deep dive into her past.

programme.title: Movie: Ice Age: Collision Course
programme.desc: When Scrat accidentally sets of a chain of events that cause a meteor storm to head toward Earth, it is up to the old gang to save the planet. Sid, Manny, and Diego go on an epic adventure to find clues to stop the meteor and save the world.

programme.title: The Simpsons: What Animated Women Want
programme.desc: Once again, Homer must save his marriage when Marge gets fed up with his behavior. Meanwhile, after watching 'A Streetcar Named Desire,' Milhouse takes on a Marlon Brando-inspired bad-boy persona to attract Lisa.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pulpit Friction
programme.desc: Homer is recruited to be a church deacon by the trendy new reverend in town. But Bart asks Flanders to help him track down their former pastor, Reverend Lovejoy, when Homer starts to embrace the faith a little too seriously.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Whiskey Business

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dangers on a Train

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homerland

programme.title: The Simpsons: Four Regrettings and a Funeral

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Kid Is All Right

programme.title: The Simpsons: Yellow Subterfuge

programme.title: Hippo vs. Croc
programme.desc: Two of Africa's deadliest species tough it out against everything nature throws at them.

programme.title: Cougar vs. Wolf
programme.desc: Big cat wrangler Boone Smith tracks recent wolf and cougar skirmishes as he delves into why these two big predators carry on the cats vs. dogs rivalry.

programme.title: Shark vs Predator
programme.desc: Sharks are rulers of the aquatic world, molded by evolution into a fierce predator. Few dare to challenge the king of the ocean, but we investigate what kinds of animals would be daring enough to take on these killing machines.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Bear Trapped
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley is perched in the trees waiting for a hungry bear and a reindeer needs help.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Bovine Intervention
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley treats two disgruntled pigs and a calf banding turns into a wild cow chase.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: License to Quill
programme.desc: Harper the dog needs Dr. Oakley's expertise when a chance encounter leads to a prickly situation with severe consequences.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Livestock Mutilation and Curse of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: Horses and cattle around the world are found drained of blood. The German hiker who found the Neolithic ice mummy in the Alps is found frozen in a stream.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday at Yellowstone
programme.desc: Evidence of ghostly apparitions is captured at a Civil War battlefield. When mysterious blue fires start near Yellowstone, experts worry if a super volcano eruption is imminent. Near the site of the Salem witch trials, an eerie spectacle stuns scientists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost Train of Doom
programme.desc: Experts investigate mysterious and strange events caught every day on cameras around the world, and explain how these bizarre things are possible.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Marine scientists discover a gruesome underwater death zone that seems to kill anything that dares to enter. When apocalyptic skies appear during a deadly earthquake in Ecuador, residents fear it's the end of days.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Marine scientists discover a gruesome underwater death zone that seems to kill anything that dares to enter. When apocalyptic skies appear during a deadly earthquake in Ecuador, residents fear it's the end of days.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ghosts of the Berlin Wall
programme.desc: Experts explore the mysterious abandoned ruins that were once behind the Berlin Wall, and these new investigations turn up discoveries that reveal the dark truths of East Germany and its terrifying secret police.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of James Bond
programme.desc: James Bond is one of the famous characters in history, and new discoveries reveal there might be a secret truth behind this world-famous figure. Experts team up with a former spy to separate fact from fiction and reveal the secrets of modern espionage.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Experts investigate the fate of billions of dollars in gold and artwork that Hitler stole during World War II, and using brand-new discoveries, they might finally locate the whereabouts of the missing Nazi treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Societies: Mystery and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigate if there's any truth to conspiracy theories that allege secret societies control the course of world history from behind-the scenes, and if true, new discoveries might finally reveal the extent of their global domination.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Flight of Terror
programme.desc: In 2009, an Air France flight going missing and investigators discover this tragedy could happen again. After a huge area of Siberian forest is destroyed, investigators race to find the culprit. New evidence might finally solve this century-old mystery.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: After five planes vanish in the Bermuda Triangle, new science suggests a strange geological force is responsible. Today, satellites are revealing lost tribes living in the Amazon jungle, but some civilizations remain missing, stumping experts.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Atlantis is one of the most famous disappearances of all time. After thousands of years, state-of-the-art technology might finally be able to crack this ancient mystery. And after nine hikers die in a gruesome cold case, new science provides a hot lead.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: The Roanoke colony vanished without a trace, and centuries later, it remains one of history's greatest unsolved mysteries. But new evidence might at last reveal its fate. After a man is swallowed by the earth, experts wonder if a sinkhole is to blame.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold
programme.desc: New technology reveals lost cities in inhospitable jungle, and researchers wonder if the mythical city of El Dorado could be the next discovery. After a crystal is found on a shipwreck, experts believe it could prove how the Vikings to discovered America.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Hunt for Flight MH370
programme.desc: Since 2014, the fate of Malaysia Airlines flight MH370 has remained a mystery. It's still unclear if it crashed, and if it did, the wreckage has yet to be found.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Ghost Ship of the Desert
programme.desc: After a huge cargo ship suddenly vanishes with 27 crew members on board, new evidence suggests the culprit may be a mythical rogue wave. Plus, recently discovered evidence may prove the existence of a ghost ship in the Californian desert.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: The Men Who Beat Alcatraz
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts attempt the impossible and escape from Alcatraz prison. Officials believe the men drowned, but a new scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Angie/ Paul
programme.desc: A single mother steals designer shoes and tries to return them for money resulting in a highspeed chase on the San Diego freeway. Next, an intoxicated young man rolls through a stop sign as police watch and a wild chase ensues.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Justin/ Frank
programme.desc: A struggling father resorts to illegal means to make a living, leading him into a situation involving stolen property; a doting grandfather ends up on the wrong side of the law and flees after being pulled over

programme.title: American Justice: A Model Murder
programme.desc: Police investigate a photographer when a model goes missing after a photo shoot.

programme.title: The Killer Speaks: Mad Maks: Maksim Gelman
programme.desc: In 2011, Maksim Gelman went on a brutal killing spree in New York City that left four people dead and four wounded.

programme.title: The Killer Speaks: Payback: Earl Forrest
programme.desc: Earl Forrest burst into a friend's house and gunned down two people in cold blood. He then ambushed the deputies who came knocking, leaving four more people shot. Forrest reveals the surprising reason behind the killing spree.

programme.title: The Killer Speaks: Ice Cold: Levi King
programme.desc: Levi King talks about the inner rage that led him to kill two neighbours in 2005. He claims that killing gave him a sense of peace, and when that faced, he broke into a farmhouse looking to kill again.

programme.title: The Killer Speaks: Twisted Love: Dena Riley
programme.desc: Dena Riley met convicted rapist Richard Davis, and they shared the same twisted desire for three-way sex--followed by murder.

programme.title: The Killer Speaks: Monster Inside: Robert Lopez
programme.desc: Robert Lopez served 10 years for nearly killing his first girlfriend. When his next girlfriend gave him reason to doubt her affection, he murdered her. He speaks about the source of his rage.

programme.title: The Killer Speaks: Payback: Earl Forrest
programme.desc: Earl Forrest burst into a friend's house and gunned down two people in cold blood. He then ambushed the deputies who came knocking, leaving four more people shot. Forrest reveals the surprising reason behind the killing spree.

programme.title: The Killer Speaks: Ice Cold: Levi King
programme.desc: Levi King talks about the inner rage that led him to kill two neighbours in 2005. He claims that killing gave him a sense of peace, and when that faced, he broke into a farmhouse looking to kill again.

programme.title: The Killer Speaks: Twisted Love: Dena Riley
programme.desc: Dena Riley met convicted rapist Richard Davis, and they shared the same twisted desire for three-way sex--followed by murder.

programme.title: The Killer Speaks: Monster Inside: Robert Lopez
programme.desc: Robert Lopez served 10 years for nearly killing his first girlfriend. When his next girlfriend gave him reason to doubt her affection, he murdered her. He speaks about the source of his rage.

programme.title: American Justice: Death of a Bride
programme.desc: In September 1999, a New Jersey woman is murdered by her ex-boyfriend on her wedding day.

programme.title: Nightwatch: After Hours: Fallen Brother
programme.desc: The city is in mourning after a well-loved Police officer is shot and killed on duty.
